message:
feat: ArrayList augmented assignment support

- Track list_concat_aug (x += [...]) and list_repeat_aug (x *= n) mutations
- Generate proper ArrayList operations for list aug-assign:
  - x += [...] uses appendSlice for in-place extension
  - x *= n uses loop with appendSlice for in-place repeat
  - x[i] op= value uses .items[] direct access
- Handle special operators for ArrayList subscript: Pow, FloorDiv, Div, Mod
- Fix ordering: check dict before ArrayList to prevent type confusion
